results.name: target drake
results.description: Drakes being victimized by removal spells, reach creatures, or the like.

results.name: target goblin
results.description: Spells (typically removal spells), that have Goblins being the victim

results.name: target minotaur
results.description: Minotaurs have an unfortunate tendency to be the subject of Bad Things™ in art.

results.name: tarkir aven
results.description: Ravens, Vultures, Eagles, Tarkir has so many types of Aven!

results.name: tarot reference
results.description: Art that directly references tarot cards, generally the Rider-Waite tarot.

results.name: tarutaru
results.description: Short race from Final Fantasy XI. Not to be confused with Lalafells from Final Fantasy XIV.

results.name: tax
results.description: Extract resources from your opponents when they try to do stuff, either by making them spend extra resources or by generating them for yourself.

results.name: tax attack
results.description: Cards that prevent players from attacking unless they pay a cost, usually mana

results.name: team matters
results.description: Cards designed for Unknown events that care about what team you've chosen.

results.name: teleferico
results.description: A suspended cable car, often used to traverse the Oltec cities of Ixalan's Core.

results.name: tel-jilad
results.description: The Tree of Tales, the largest tree of the Tangle on Mirrodin.
